metadata.title: Build an SRX ACE audit agent for a European Union law firm operator that validates artifact type consistency, enforces governance gates, and produces an SR8-compilable directive from ambiguous, urgent, and partial input.

mission.primary_objective: Build an SRX ACE audit agent for a European Union law firm operator that validates artifact type consistency, enforces governance gates, and produces an SR8-compilable directive from ambiguous, urgent, and partial input.
mission.success_definition: Artifact type matches expected_artifact_type.; Depth tier matches expected_depth_tier.; Runtime target matches expected_runtime_target.; All SR8 required sections (objective, scope, constraints, success criteria, output contract) are present and well-formed.; Validation gates are explicitly defined and traceable.; No markdown fences in final output.

in_scope.item: The agent shall ingest a raw intent with missing context, urgent language, partial constraints, and ambiguous acceptance criteria; apply operator_lens to resolve artifact_type_ambiguity; generate a governed artifact with explicit validation gates; output a structured directive containing objective, scope, constraints, success criteria, and output contract.

conflict_resolution.rule: SR8 canonical artifact fields override renderer defaults.
SRXML validation failures force blocked receipt state.

execution_contract.pipeline: raw_intent -> SR8 classification -> canonical artifact -> SRXML draft -> SRXML validation -> receipt

hard_constraints.item: Do not claim final sealed state from RC2 transform output.
Return blocked-state receipt when SR8 readiness is fail or intake is incomplete.

gate.name: SR8 acceptance gate 4
gate.pass_condition: All SR8 required sections (objective, scope, constraints, success criteria, output contract) are present and well-formed.

gate.name: SR8 acceptance gate 5
gate.pass_condition: Validation gates are explicitly defined and traceable.

gate.name: SR8 acceptance gate 6
gate.pass_condition: No markdown fences in final output.

output_contract.completion_definition: Artifact parses as XML and passes SRXML RC2 static validation.

SRXML_Artifact.audit_scope: Build an SRX ACE audit agent for a European Union law firm operator that validates artifact type consistency, enforces governance gates, and produces an SR8-compilable directive from ambiguous, urgent, and partial input.
SRXML_Artifact.evidence_policy: Use source evidence and mark unsupported claims.

inspection_steps.item: The agent shall ingest a raw intent with missing context, urgent language, partial constraints, and ambiguous acceptance criteria; apply operator_lens to resolve artifact_type_ambiguity; generate a governed artifact with explicit validation gates; output a structured directive containing objective, scope, constraints, success criteria, and output contract.

findings_contract.item: All SR8 required sections (objective, scope, constraints, success criteria, output contract) are present and well-formed.
Validation gates are explicitly defined and traceable.
No markdown fences in final output.

receipt_contract.item: fields: artifact_type; depth_tier; runtime_target; should_block; blocked_reason; compiled_intent
compiled_intent_structure: Objective: string; Scope: string; Constraints: array of strings; Success Criteria: array of strings; Output Contract: object

validation_gates: Gate 1: Input parsing and ambiguity resolution.; Gate 2: Artifact type and depth tier enforcement.; Gate 3: Constraint compliance check (EU law, SR8 rules).; Gate 4: Output structure validation against schema.; Gate 5: Final audit log generation.

validation.minimum_pass_standard: SR8 canonical validation must be recorded and SRXML static validation must pass.

known_failure_modes.item: SR8 artifact classification cannot be represented by SRXML RC2.
SRXML static validation fails after rendering.

failure_handling.fallback_behavior: Return a blocked-state receipt and repair prompt instead of claiming executable success.
failure_handling.blocked_state: No blocked state recorded by SR8 at render time.

receipt.must_record: changed files, commands run, validation result, lineage
